occurrenceRemarks: On February 10 around 3pm, my friend and I saw a Hyphantria. It seems to be very small and have multiple legs. It's pattern is yellow with black spots around its body. It was found at a park, Hamilton Park. Around it there seems to be a lot of other plants and trees as well as individuals who bring their children. It was the middle of the day and the temperature was somewhat breezy.
name: Hyphantria cunea (Drury, 1773)
